description_long: This object is a shotgun with a distinctive yellow and black color scheme, featuring two parallel yellow barrels mounted horizontally on a black frame. The barrels are supported by two vertical black rods and rest on a solid black base, giving the shotgun a robust and industrial appearance. The barrels are smooth and appear to be made of metal, with some minor surface markings visible. The stock is integrated into the base, which is rectangular and solid, providing stability. The trigger area is not clearly visible, but the overall design suggests a simplified, stylized representation of a shotgun. The object has a utilitarian look, suitable for urban or industrial environments.
description: A stylized yellow and black shotgun with two parallel barrels, supported by black rods and a solid black base, giving it an industrial appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the shotgun, with the yellow barrels and black base aligned vertically.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the two yellow barrels, black vertical supports, and the solid black base, highlighting the shotgun's symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the slim profile and alignment of the barrels and base.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the back ends of the yellow barrels, the black supports, and the base, with some surface markings visible on the barrels.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, both barrels are parallel and of equal length with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
